g.text: Activity Diagram - Weekly Schedule Entry And Class Meeting Generation
Administrator enters group, semester, subject, teacher, class type, meeting mode, day, time
Administrator clicks Save Weekly Schedule Entry
Show "Teacher is not qualified to teach this subject."
System iterates dates between semester.startDate and semester.endDate
Set subject, teacher, group, type, mode, status SCHEDULED
Show "Room is already booked for this time slot."
Generated meetings appear in Public Weekly Schedule and personal schedules
